title: theme — global helpers
description: Global function helpers registered via the module's service provider. Kept small — theme is not a helper-heavy module.

helpers.name: theme_tokens
helpers.purpose: Convenience wrapper around TokenResolver::resolveTokens(). Resolves the caller's active theme tokens for the current tenant + requested mode (or the tenant's default mode). Returns the frozen tokens_snapshot as an associative array keyed by token_key. Cached via Redis theme:resolved:{tenant_id}:{mode}.

helpers.name: theme_css_url
helpers.purpose: Convenience wrapper. Returns the signed compiled CSS URL for the current tenant + mode. Suitable for a <link rel="stylesheet" href="..."> in SSR templates.

notes: Both helpers respect the current tenant scope via tenancy::CurrentTenant.
Helpers ARE optional — code that prefers explicit DI reaches for TokenResolver + CssRenderer bindings directly.
No helper for token-override CRUD — those flows go through the HTTP surface or explicit repository injection.
